TrendVault Daily Trend Scan — 2026-05-19

Scanned 13 trending products across ExplodingTopics and Google Trends Shopping.

Top 3 Trends:
1. 🎙️ Podcast Microphone — 60.5K search vol, +1150% growth. Highest volume product. Creator economy driving sustained demand.
2. 💊 GLP-1 Supplement — 49.5K search vol, +925% growth. Natural Ozempic alternative trend still surging.
3. 🧴 PDRN Cream — 40.5K search vol, +5900% growth. Korean regenerative skincare leading beauty category.

New Google Trends Signals:
- Sony PlayStation Plus price hike — 20K+ searches, +200% (gaming news spike)
- Apple Card AirPods Pro promo — 2K+ searches, +75% (tech deal opportunity)

Categories tracked: gadgets: 5, fitness: 3, beauty: 2, pets: 2, home: 1

Sources: ExplodingTopics.com, Google Trends Shopping (past 24h). Amazon Movers & Shakers blocked by CAPTCHA.
Next: Content gen cron at 09:00 will use this data for blog post generation.
